subject: feat: implement 6 TODO items — feedback, a11y, platforms, fonts, looks, suggestions
body:
High Priority (3 items):

1. Unassigned image feedback: addImage() returns { id, assigned } instead
   of just id. All 4 callers in MediaTab/SampleImagesSection updated to
   show toast when all cells occupied. Addresses UX Non-Negotiable
   violation (silent failure on user action).

2. Accessibility pass: ~20 elements across 5 files — aria-label on
   platform chevrons/format buttons (PlatformPreview), role="menuitem"
   on mobile menu items (App), aria-label on overlay type buttons
   (StyleTab), aria-label on color picker (TemplatesTab),
   aria-hidden="true" on decorative SVGs (MobileNav, App),
   aria-label="Main navigation" on nav (MobileNav).

3. Phase 4 platform format data: 15 new formats across 7 groups —
   Pinterest (Pin, Story), Snapchat (Ad, Story), YouTube (Thumbnail,
   End Screen), WhatsApp (Status), Threads (Post, Story), Product
   Images (Square, Portrait), Store Banners (Hero, Category). New
   'ecommerce' category. Total: 18 groups, 42 formats.

Medium Priority (3 items):

4. Lazy font loading: Only 2 active fonts load on mount via fontsToLoad
   useMemo. Remaining 13 load when StyleTab Fonts section expands
   (CollapsibleSection onExpand callback). Reduces initial requests
   from 15 to 2.

5. Looks per-element text styling: Added textStyles to all 20 look
   presets with per-element color/bold overrides (5 palettes: clean,
   bold, dark, warm, artistic). applyStylePreset merges into text
   elements preserving content/visible/size.

6. Calculate imageAspectRatio: Derived from first image naturalWidth/
   Height in App.jsx, passed to TemplatesTab. Suggested layouts now
   adapt to image orientation instead of returning fixed 3 defaults.

Tags: feature, ux, a11y, platforms, fonts, looks, suggestions
Complexity: 4
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: todo-implementation
Semver: minor
